channel.title: Linkdinger — AI Tools & Thoughts
channel.description: AI-powered tools and thoughts. Every commit lands on GitHub for you to fork & remix.

item.title: Building a Smart Blog with Dark Glassmorphism
item.description: How I built a dual-theme blog with Obsidian CMS integration, Cloudflare R2 image pipeline, and award-winning design patterns.

item.title: ลองเล่น Dark Glassmorphism ใน Next.js
item.description: พามาดูว่าเทรนด์การออกแบบ UI แบบโปร่งแสง พอกลายมาเป็น Dark Mode แล้วจะดูลึกลับและพรีเมียมขนาดไหน พร้อมตัวอย่างโค้ดไปลองเล่นกัน

item.title: The Rise of Autonomous AI Agents
item.description: How AI agents are moving from simple chatbots to autonomous systems that can code, design, and orchestrate complex workflows.

item.title: Why Neubrutalism is Taking Over the Web
item.description: Exploring the anti-design movement characterized by high-contrast colors, harsh shadows, and unapologetic typography.

item.title: Mastering Next.js Server Components
item.description: A deep dive into how React Server Components change the way we architect web applications for maximum performance.

item.title: Replacing conventional CMS with Obsidian
item.description: Why I stopped dealing with cluttered database-driven CMS platforms and moved my entire publishing workflow to local markdown files.

item.title: The Art of Vibe Coding
item.description: Coding is no longer just about logic and algorithms. It's about flow state, aesthetics, and building systems that feel alive.
